verses.text: Ka cihmawh ciangin Topa' tungah ka kiko a, amah in hong dawng hi
Topa aw, mizuaute leh mikhemte' kiang panin kei hong honkhia in
Mikhem theite aw, note' tungah bang hong kipia ding a, note' tungah bang hong kihih ding ahi hiam
Galhangpa' thal hiamte leh sesing hol-am hi ding hi
Note lakah ka omkhak pen Meshek gamsungah ten'khak sangin haksazaw a, Kedar mite lakah ten'khak sangin siahuaizaw hi
Gal kilemna a deihlo mite lakah sauvei ka teng luakha hi
Kei pen gal kilemna a ngaihsun mi ka hi hi. Ahih hangin kilemna ding thu ka gen ciangin amaute in galkido ding utna tengin nei uh hi.
